name: Fruit and Nut Coffee Cake Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the dried fruit.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water; let stand for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl of electric mixer, combine flour, salt, and cardamom.
4. While mixing on low speed with dough hook, gradually blend in yeast mixture, butter, apple juice concentrate, and eggs.
5. Beat for 2 minutes at medium speed.
6. Beat in enough remaining flour to form stiff dough. Continue to beat until the dough is smooth and elastic (Dough may be kneaded by hand on a lightly floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Or it may be mixed in a breadmaker).
7. Let rest for 20 minutes.
8. Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to a 22" x 12-inch rectangle.
9. Spread fruit spread evenly down the center of the rectangle, leaving a 1-inch border along both long sides.
10. Sprinkle fruit bits and nuts evenly over the fruit spread.
11. Starting at one long side, roll dough up tightly; pinch the seam to seal. Place on greased cookie sheet.
12. Bring ends of the roll together to form a ring; pinch the ends together to seal, using water if necessary.
13. With scissors or a sharp knife, make diagonal cuts about 1-inch apart into the top of the ring.
14. Let rise in a warm place for 30 minutes. (Dough will not double in volume.)
15. Preheat oven to 375°F.
16. Beat together egg and cold water; brush over the ring.
17. Bake for 25-30 minutes, until golden brown. Immediately remove from the pan. Cool on a wire rack. Serve warm or at room temperature.
